issues.description: SearchDeck action is incomplete. The effect must: (1) look at 3 cards from top of deck, (2) reveal up to 1 Dressrosa Event, (3) add it to hand, (4) place rest at bottom in any order. Current DSL only searches by name, missing the multi-step reveal/sort mechanic. Filter should use ByType for Event type, not ByName.
Filter uses ByName instead of ByType. Effect requires filtering by {Dressrosa} type AND Event type, not a specific card name.
